title: Migration Eval Gold Anchor Entry
description: Schema for a single merge-survival label in the migration-eval gold anchor set (PRD M4-lite). Labels are harvested automatically by scripts/mine_gold_anchor.py from public OSS migration PRs that were merged and survived >=30 days without a revert. Entries are stored as a JSON array; this schema validates one element. See docs/gold_anchor.md for scope and re-anchoring cadence.

commit_sha.description: Commit SHA evaluated — typically the merge commit of the source PR.

human_verdict.description: Implicit maintainer verdict from merge-survival: 'accept' = PR merged and survived >=30 days without revert; 'reject' = closed-unmerged or merged-then-reverted. Field name retained for schema backward compatibility.

reviewer_notes.description: Provenance string — typically the source PR URL and the survival-check method that produced the verdict.

labeled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the label was harvested.
